name: Pasta with Artichoke Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 package artichoke hearts, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and garlic. Cook until the onions are soft and golden.
2. Add the cooked artichoke hearts to the skillet. Stir over medium-low heat for 3 minutes.
3. Add the chopped parsley, white wine, black olives, and lemon zest. Stir briefly.
4. Drain the hot pasta and add it to the skillet with the sauce. Mix well until the pasta is evenly coated.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Serve topped with grated Parmesan cheese.
